tasks.description: Create reputation scoring service at backend/src/services/reputation.ts

tasks.context:
FILE: backend/src/routes/reputation.ts (CREATE NEW — does not exist yet)

Create a reputation route. Max 200 lines. Pattern: same as backend/src/routes/ledger.ts (Router from express, createClient from @supabase/supabase-js, async handlers, typed void return).

IMPORT: import { computeAndStoreReputation } from '../services/reputation';

ENDPOINT 1: GET /x402/oracle/score/:agentId
- Public endpoint — NO requireApiKey middleware. Oracle data is intentionally public.
- Extract agentId from req.params.agentId
- Call computeAndStoreReputation(agentId)
- If result.invoicesCompleted === 0 AND result.invoicesDisputed === 0:
    return res.status(404).json({ success: false, error: { message: 'Agent not found or no invoice history', code: 'NOT_FOUND' } })
- Otherwise return:
    res.json({
      success: true,
      data: {
        agentId:            result.agentId,
        score:              result.score,
        tier:               result.tier,
        invoicesCompleted:  result.invoicesCompleted,
        invoicesDisputed:   result.invoicesDisputed,
        totalValueSettled:  result.totalValueSettled,
        lastUpdated:        result.lastUpdated,
        verifiedAt:         new Date().toISOString(),
      }
    })
- On catch: res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: { message: err.message, code: 'DB_ERROR' } })

ENDPOINT 2: GET /x402/oracle/scores
- Public leaderboard — top 50 agents by score.
- Use getSb() from createClient (same helper pattern as services/reputation.ts):
    const { data, error } = await getSb()
      .from('AgentReputation')
      .select('agentId, score, tier, invoicesCompleted, totalValueSettled, lastUpdated')
      .order('score', { ascending: false })
      .limit(50)
- On error: res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: { message: error.message, code: 'DB_ERROR' } })
- Success: res.json({ success: true, data: data || [] })

export default router;
